subject: fix(ux): remove "Clear all data" button from workspace list
body:
Nuclear delete-everything on the main screen is too dangerous.
Individual workspace deletion is available from each workspace's
own view, which is sufficient. Removed the button, handler function,
confirmation dialog, and all documentation references.

Tags: ux, safety, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: data-management
Semver: minor
